response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates substantial expertise in distributed systems, high-throughput architectures, and multi-language proficiency, aligning well with core technical requirements. His recent role in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) shows direct exposure to agentic systems, though not exclusively in high-growth or frontier-tech contexts. His operational ownership, stakeholder coordination, and agile experience are strong, but his background lacks clear evidence of leading technical strategy at scale or handling high-stakes incident response in recent roles.
strengths: Deep expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/sec at dunnhumby)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators) at re:cinq
Strong operational readiness, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practices (RIDE Capital, Altom Consulting)
concerns: Limited evidence of full technical-strategy ownership at Staff/Principal level (re:cinq role is recent and may still be in transition)
No explicit mention of on-call rotation or incident-response leadership in recent roles
Background lacks high-growth or frontier-technology company exposure (e.g., AI-native environments)
